title: Bodycam footage shows airlift of girl stranded by Texas floods
description: Footage shows a rescuer reaching a family of three stranded by floods that destroyed their house in Uvalde county.
text: Footage shows a rescuer reaching a family of three stranded by floods that destroyed their house in Uvalde county.

Bodycam footage shows airlift of girl stranded by Texas floods.

Footage shows a rescuer reaching a family of three stranded by floods that destroyed their house in Uvalde county.
